response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse full-stack experience, but lacks explicit leadership in IT consulting, UML architecture, and German language proficiency (only basic), which are critical for this executive-level role focused on client advisory and German-speaking environments.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with GISCollective and DLang libraries
Proven full-stack expertise across Node.js, TypeScript, Linux, and DevOps tooling
Strong track record of mentoring and creating technical workshops/courses
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not C1 as required
No clear evidence of IT consulting experience or client architecture advisory
Lacks documented UML expertise or formal requirements management in roles
